# GPT-OSS-20B MoE — PROMPT-phase routing profiles, FULL FUSED format
#
# Each line drives the entire MoE block in one group_matmul_direct() call,
# with the library managing intermediate scratch (use_internal_alloc=1):
#   Op1 (gate+up) → gated_act → Op2 (down_proj) → weighted reduce
#
# Workload: B=32, input_tokens=128, output_tokens=128  (E2E prompt phase)
# Architecture: 32 experts, topk=4, hidden=2880, intermediate=2880
#   K  = 2880   (input hidden_size)
#   N  = 5760   (gate+up width = 2*intermediate)
#   N_down = 2880   (down_proj output = hidden_size)
#
# Format: num_ops, M_per_op, K, N, iters, src:wei:dst, weights_const,
#         warmup, moe_topk, gated_act, N_down, use_internal_alloc,
#         total_experts
#   gated_act=3       : swiglu_oai_mul (interleaved gate/up layout)
#   moe_topk=4        : weighted-reduce post-op enabled
#   use_internal_alloc=1 : library allocates Op1 scratch + reuses src for Op2
#   total_experts=32  : framework prepack-extras contract
#
# Frames sorted by sum_M ascending (light → heavy).  Use --filter to
# pick a subset; e.g. `--max sum_M=8192` for light-prompt-only tuning.
#
# Iteration policy: sum_M >= 16384 → iters=20/warmup=5;
#                    sum_M >=  4096 → iters=50/warmup=10;
#                    sum_M <   4096 → iters=100/warmup=20
# =======================================================================

# frame=001 phase=prompt sum_M=512 num_ops=12
12, 1:1:48:128:78:127:99:9:5:12:3:1, 2880, 5760, 100, bf16:bf16:bf16, true, 20, 4, 3, 2880, 1, 32
